description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring long, broad, lance-shaped green leaves with a smooth texture and subtle yellowish margins. The leaves are arranged in a dense, upright cluster, radiating outward from the center and overlapping each other, giving the plant a lush and healthy appearance. The pot is circular, relatively shallow, and appears to be made of a reddish-brown material with visible weathering and some irregularities along the rim. There are no visible flowers or fruits, and the plant's foliage dominates the visual impression. The pot itself is plain, lacking any intricate decorative patterns or embellishments. This type of plant is commonly used for decorative purposes in urban environments, such as on sidewalks, patios, or near building entrances.
description: A lush potted plant with long, broad green leaves and a plain, weathered reddish-brown pot, ideal for urban decorative use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright, overlapping green leaves and the circular, weathered rim of the reddish-brown pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, pointed leaves extending horizontally and the shallow depth of the pot.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the dense, radial arrangement of the leaves and the open center of the pot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the layered leaves and the pot's rim, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_plant_species: Dracaena (likely Dracaena fragrans or similar broad-leaf variety)
